title: helichrysum ruderale
intro: Helichrysum ruderale is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to southern Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, bruises, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting tissue repair, reducing pain, and fighting off infections. Helichrysum ruderale is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
